API Reference¶

flask_app¶

scrape¶

The Grad Cafe Scraper for Assignment Scrapes data and exports to JSON format for LLM-based cleaning

class scrape.GradCafeScraper[source]¶

Bases: object

Scraper for The Grad Cafe admission results

scrape_dataset(num_pages: int = 1, output_file: str = 'gradcafe_data.json', delay: float = 0.0, params: Dict | None = None) → List[Dict][source]¶

Scrape multiple pages and save to JSON

scrape_page(page_num: int = 1, params: Dict | None = None) → List[Dict][source]¶

Scrape a single page of results

scrape.scrape_data()[source]¶

Wrapper used by Flask app. Returns a small dataset for pull-data endpoint.

load_data¶

load_data.get_connection()[source]¶

Connect using DATABASE_URL if available

load_data.load_rows(rows)[source]¶

Insert rows into database. Used by Flask /pull-data endpoint.

query_data¶

query_data.compute_analysis()[source]¶

Used by Flask /analysis endpoint. Returns dictionary for template rendering.

query_data.get_connection()[source]¶

Grad Cafe Analytics
